positive: A vibrant, minimalist graphic design of a stylized cosmic sloth hanging peacefully from a glowing crescent moon. The sloth is rendered in clean, bold silhouette with deep teal and mustard yellow accents. The background features a deep indigo nebula pattern overlaid with sparse, geometric constellations. Style: modern celestial pop art, vector illustration quality, clean lines, high contrast, perfect symmetry. Composition: Central focus on the sloth and moon, designed for seamless apparel printing. Lighting: Flat, highly saturated, studio lighting. Color Palette: Indigo, deep teal, mustard yellow, and creamy white.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, noise, poor anatomy, messy, grainy, photorealistic, 3d render, clutter, logos, signatures, faces, hands
